name: Wario Land
description: Wario platforming series focused on treasure hunting, transformation mechanics, exploration, and greedy antihero comedy.

eras.title: Handheld Treasure-Hunting Era
eras.description: The Game Boy and Game Boy Color entries define Wario Land through treasure, transformations, and exploratory platforming.

eras.title: Console Revival Era
eras.description: Wario Land returns on Wii with hand-drawn presentation and classic platforming structure.
